item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This has me crying in the metaphysical club. Good job. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I loved making it, making images for articles is one of my favorite things to do on this site!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Updated to include Taste's drawing of him and Rex, as made by the talented Pastarasta1.
Make sure to check out his stuff as well!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This is…okay. It's not poorly written or anything, it just doesn't go anywhere.

Without background on the SCP itself, and with logs that have nothing to do with it's anomalous properties except it being sapient, it just falls flat for me.

No vote.

item.title: Re: +1
item.content:encoded: Also, I hope Señor Ass-Kicking has a brief word with Rex.
To me, this is kind of like the unwholesome version of the Iron Giant. Definite +1 here for sure, and I would love to see more featuring Señor Taste.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
You go and resurrect the Tiny Señors, tantalize me with the possibilities of Señor Purple's return, and then you

You're like if someone tried making a really shitty Little Mister.

Oh my god, this guy is a dick. D:

I loved it +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Señor Taste reminds me of Chappie.

That said, this is very cute and very heartwrenching.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
For all honestly: Rex is a cold Dick.

In other words, getting Mr. Taste's secretions on him in the 3rd interview…

… Turned him toxic?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Really good character piece; enthusiastic +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Welp. You’ve done it. I want to clock an imaginary character in the throat and rescue poor Taste.

Rex is gonna go the same way as that dude who fed kids to 682. Mark my words.

Take your filthy upvote. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Rex: No. I never was your friend.

;w;

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Fuck Rex. This made me feel things.

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: you made me angry again >: (

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I have the sudden racing urge to add 5057 and Rex into some big multiverse collapse story……maybe add in the shit with this guy.

For all honestly: Rex is a cold Dick.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I had trouble reading this at first because I don't think the tone behind some of the dialogue was clear to me the first time.

+ Dialogue tone
– hide block

The lines

Rex: Yes. You're like if someone tried making a really shitty Little Mister.

and

Rex: Of course you don't understand. You're just a stupid little plastic failure of a children's product.

…for example, read as stilted to me until I read a second time and imagined Rex as a dude who genuinely doesn't give a shit about Taste, beyond disgust. Imagining him just kinda muttering that second line while loading stuff into the cart really helped it feel more natural. But then lines like

Rex: Indeed! Now, let's begin. It says here you are coated in ethylene glycol?

and

Rex: Do not press this further.

are so formally phrased that it kind of breaks that dispassionate and condescending character. That contrast makes the dialogue feel difficult for me to emotionally follow.

That aside, I enjoy the way you juxtapose the emotional abuse of a sentient being with its similarly unconcerned treatment under Foundation bureaucracy. It gives a sense of how little the Foundation cares about small-fry objects like Taste beyond being a means to some end. Personally I think Taste's abuse isn't particularly more interesting or emotionally engaging on its own than any other article in which a sentient SCP is cruelly treated, even though Taste's childlikeness does make it sting a little. It's those bureaucratic and cold emails that do it for me. I also like the subtle commentary on brand loyalism under capitalism, intentional or not. You'd think any dude mass-producing child-marketed and extremely dangerous anomalies would be given equal concern by the foundation regardless of brand, but.

+ stupidly small nitpick
– hide block

The "to do so" in "It is sentient and capable of speech, despite lacking the necessary organs to do so" should be chopped.

Let me know if I'm reading that dialogue wrong.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: i knew, i KNEW, opening interview #3, that this was going to break my heart. and you did! you broke my heart. poor señor taste just doesn't know any better. take your +1 and get out of here.

item.title: NO
item.content:encoded: NO. I WILL RESCUE MR TASTE. THIS WILL NOT STAND. I WILL WAGE THIS WAR ON MY OWN IF I MUST

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
words cannot describe how happy i am to see the concept of the Señor knock off Wondertainment products returning.

im wondering when someone will attempt a new little misters batch

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This makes me sad and angry. Less-than-smart things getting taken advantage of is an easy in to my “oh god I hate this” part of my brain. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Thank you to stuff, kirby, and uranium for crit.

The Tiny Señors are a concept created by Jekeled, I was so amused by the idea that I wanted to write my own Señor.
